cit.basis: Flat 25% impôt sur les bénéfices industriels et commerciaux (BIC) on taxable profit (Code Général des Impôts de Côte d'Ivoire).

minimum_tax.name: Impôt minimum forfaitaire (IMF)
minimum_tax.note: 0.5% of turnover (incl. tax), subject to national floor and cap amounts per the CGI — bounds not modelled in this SME estimator.

cit.note: Administered by the DGI (Direction Générale des Impôts). Telecom/IT/communication sector rate is 30%.

vat.name: TVA
vat.note: Standard 18% TVA; a reduced 9% rate applies to certain goods (e.g. milk, pasta).

official_sources.name: DGI — Direction Générale des Impôts (Côte d'Ivoire)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
IMF floor/cap bounds, sector rates, WHT, relief and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official DGI guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
